prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为15484名→21371名→24840名→34819名→23947名。2021至2024年位次持续后移（数字增大），累计后移约19335名；2025年较2024 年大幅前移约10872名，回升至接近2023年水平，显示2024年因专业组结构调整出现的异常低位已修复，2025年基准位次约23947名；该校在江苏省物理类招生计 划2021年114人、2022年117人、2023年117人、2024年138人、2025年139人、2026年142人。2026年较2025年扩招3人（+2.16%），连续多年小幅扩招，扩招对竞争压力有轻 微缓解作用。

prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业为2024–2025年高热推荐专业，东华大学物理类招生涵盖计算机类、人工智能、数据科学、电子信息类等热门方向 ，对考生吸引力较强；江苏省物理类考生数从2021年16.6万持续增长至2025年26.1万，2026年总考生52.1万，按近年比例估算物理类约38.0万，较2025年增加约11.9万人（+45.7% ），考生规模大幅扩大将显著加剧竞争，整体竞争环境趋紧；东华大学位于上海市，对江苏省考生具 有较强地域吸引力；该校在江苏省招生人数占比较高，2025年物理类139人、历史类24人，属于在苏招生规模较大的沪上高校之一。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次23947名 、2026年计划小幅扩招2.16%（使位次数字增大）、江苏省物理类考生暴增约45.7%（使位次数字减小）、学校软科排名持续上升增强吸引力（使位次数字减小）、热门专业布局提 升报考热度（使位次数字减小）等多重因素，考生规模大幅扩大和学校吸引力增强的效应超过扩招的缓解作用，预计2026年最低录取位次较2025年小幅前移。预测最低位次约2405 7名，区间23557–24557名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were 15484 → 21371 → 24840 → 34819 → 23947. Rankings continuously shifted backward (numbers increased) from 2021 to 2024, with a cumulative backward shift of approximately 19335; in 2025, there was a significant forward shift of about 10872 compared to 2024, returning to near the 2023 level, indicating that the abnormal low point in 2024 due to major group restructuring has been corrected, with the baseline ranking for 2025 being approximately 23947; the university's enrollment plan in Jiangsu for Physics Category was 114 in 2021, 117 in 2022, 117 in 2023, 138 in 2024, 139 in 2025, and 142 in 2026. In 2026, there is a slight expansion of 3 students (+2.16%) compared to 2025, with continuous small expansions over several years, which slightly alleviates competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Donghua University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; its Soft Science China University Rankings have been steadily rising, from 81st in 2021 → 80th in 2022 → 77th in 2023 → 76th in 2024 → 74th in 2025 → 72nd in 2026, reflecting the university's comprehensive strength and recognition; no significant negative or positive events were found in reputation documents; the university's Douyin popularity ranking is 96th (rated as average), with a comprehensive popularity of about 163,000, placing it in the middle-to-lower range among 211 universities, with no abnormal signals in application popularity; there are no records of enrollment gaps in the abnormal enrollment files, overall public opinion is stable; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Materials Science and Engineering was rated A-level, the only A- or above discipline at the university; Textile Science and Engineering is a traditional strength but not shown as A-level in public data; related majors such as Materials Class and Functional Materials are directly linked to advantageous disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Class, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation are highly recommended for 2024–2025; Donghua University's Physics Category enrollment includes popular directions like Computer Class, Artificial Intelligence, Data Science, and Electronic Information Class, which are attractive to candidates; the number of Physics Category candidates in Jiangsu has grown from 166,000 in 2021 to 261,000 in 2025, with total candidates in 2026 at 521,000, estimated Physics Category at about 380,000 based on recent proportions, an increase of about 119,000 (+45.7%) compared to 2025, significantly intensifying competition; Donghua University is located in Shanghai, which has strong regional appeal to Jiangsu candidates; the university's enrollment proportion in Jiangsu is relatively high, with 139 in Physics Category and 24 in History Category in 2025, making it one of the larger-scale Shanghai universities enrolling in Jiangsu.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors including the 2025 baseline ranking of 23947, a slight expansion of 2.16% in 2026 (which increases the ranking number), a surge of about 45.7% in Jiangsu Physics Category candidates (which decreases the ranking number), the continuous rise in Soft Science rankings enhancing attractiveness (decreasing the ranking number), and the layout of popular majors boosting application enthusiasm (decreasing the ranking number), the effect of the large increase in candidate numbers and enhanced university attractiveness outweighs the mitigating effect of expansion. It is predicted that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will slightly shift forward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 24057, with a range of 23557–24557.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 23557–24557, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. If the ranking is better than the lower limit of the range (<23557), prioritize Tier 1 popular majors such as Computer Class and Artificial Intelligence; if the ranking is near the upper limit (>24557), mainly rely on Tier 3 majors for safety while aiming for Tier 2 medium majors. Donghua University's Materials Science and Engineering is an A-level discipline; although related majors have lower social popularity, their academic strength is strong, making them suitable for candidates interested in materials and textiles.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were 3762 → 4716 → 5997 → 5365 → 5101. Rankings continuously moved backward (numbers increased) from 2021 to 2023, with a cumulative backward shift of about 2235; in 2024, compared to 2023, there was a forward shift of about 632, and in 2025, compared to 2024, a forward shift of about 264, showing a slight forward trend in the past two years, with a baseline ranking of about 5101 in 2025. The enrollment plan for History Category in Jiangsu Province was 43 in 2021, 40 in 2022, 40 in 2023, 24 in 2024, 24 in 2025, and 27 in 2026. After a significant reduction to 24 in 2024, there is an expansion of 3 students (+12.5%) in 2026, which has a mitigating effect on competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Donghua University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; its Soft Science ranking has continuously risen to 72nd in 2026, with steadily improving comprehensive strength and brand recognition, enhancing its appeal to candidates. No significant negative or positive events were found in reputation documents; Douyin popularity ranking is 96th (rated as average), with stable public opinion; no record of filing gaps, indicating stable application psychology; Materials Science and Engineering is rated A-level as the university's strongest discipline, but the History Category enrollment majors (Economics and Management Experimental Class, Economics and Trade Class, Social Sciences Experimental Class, Journalism and Communication Class, Japanese, English) are all in economics, management, literature, and law, with low correlation to the advantageous disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Economics and management, law (Social Sciences Experimental Class includes law) have a social popularity of divided observation, journalism and communication class is clearly discouraged, foreign languages are generally observed; the number of History Category candidates increased from 95,000 in 2021 to 97,000 in 2025, and in 2026, total candidates are 521,000, with an estimated History Category of about 141,000 based on recent proportions, an increase of about 44,000 (+45.6%) compared to 2025, significantly intensifying competition, with overall stability slightly rising; Donghua University is located in Shanghai, which has strong regional appeal to Jiangsu History Category candidates; in 2025, only 24 History Category students were admitted, making it a small-scale enrollment group in Jiangsu, with the scarcity of enrollment slots increasing competition intensity.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 5101, the 2026 enrollment expansion of 12.5% (which increases the ranking number), the surge in Jiangsu History Category candidates by about 45.6% (which decreases the ranking number), the rise in Donghua University's Soft Science ranking enhancing appeal (which decreases the ranking number), and the overall cool social popularity of History Category enrollment majors (which increases the ranking number), the effect of the significant expansion in candidate numbers far outweighs the offsetting effects of enrollment expansion and cool popularity. It is predicted that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will slightly move forward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 5404, with a range of 4904–5904.
